absorption: Significant BID absorption is occurring at the VAL, supported by a large stacked bid wall below.
dom_observation: Large stacked bid wall from 60500 down to 60420 is absorbing selling pressure at the Value Area Low.
reasoning: Fiyat, gunluk deger alani alt sinirinda (VAL) buyuk bir yigilma alim emri duvari (stacked bids) tarafindan destekleniyor ve satis baskisini absorbe ediyor.
